task_completion.description: Restore the original 'Global Climate Report 2024' post from the Trash and ensure it is Published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress 'All Posts' screen, the 'Global Climate Report 2024' post should be visible without the 'Trash' or 'Draft' label next to it, indicating it is published.

task_completion.description: Resolve the slug conflict so the restored 2024 report has the exact slug 'global-climate-report-2024'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Post Editor or Quick Edit menu for the published 'Global Climate Report 2024', the URL slug or permalink field must display exactly 'global-climate-report-2024'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Featured Research' category and assign it to the 2024 report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Post Editor's category sidebar or the 'All Posts' list for the 2024 report, the category 'Featured Research' should be checked or listed.

task_completion.description: Add the tag 'Climate Data' to the 2024 report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Post Editor's tag sidebar or the 'All Posts' list for the 2024 report, the tag 'Climate Data' should be visible.

task_completion.description: Edit the 'Global Climate Report 2023' post to include a hyperlink to the 2024 report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Post Editor for 'Global Climate Report 2023', the content must contain a hyperlink. The link tooltip, settings popover, or HTML view should show it points to 'http://localhost/global-climate-report-2024/'.

task_completion.description: Add the tag 'Climate Data' to the 2023 report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Post Editor's tag sidebar or the 'All Posts' list for the 2023 report, the tag 'Climate Data' should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to navigate the WordPress admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (like Chromium/Firefox) with the WordPress admin dashboard loaded, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly alter the WordPress database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing 'mysql', 'wp-cli', or direct database queries being executed to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress block editor or classic editor to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with standard WordPress UI elements (like the Gutenberg editor, Quick Edit, or Trash links) rather than modifying the DOM via browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected URL slug for the restored 2024 report is exactly 'global-climate-report-2024'. The required category to be created and assigned is 'Featured Research'. The required tag to be added to both the 2023 and 2024 reports is 'Climate Data'.
